page_metadata.biotools__summary: DetectIS is a pipeline specifically designed to detect exogenous DNA integration sites using DNA or RNA paired-end sequencing data. The workflow manager nextflow is used with a configuration file and a Singularity image.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DetectIS is a pipeline specifically designed to detect exogenous DNA integration sites using DNA or RNA paired-end sequencing data. The workflow manager nextflow is used with a configuration file and a Singularity image.
